# PR Review Checklist


- [ ] **The code is understandable.**
  - [ ] Follows formatting conventions (spacing, indents, etc.)
  - [ ] Uses names that reflect behavior
  - [ ] Hard-to-understand areas are commented
  - [ ] Documentation is updated where needed

- [ ] **The code is well structured.**
  - [ ] Organized into logical components
  - [ ] Components reflect the behavior/requirements they implement
  - [ ] Components have clearly defined single responsibilities

- [ ] **The code is correct.**
  - [ ] Changes include tests proving the fix/feature works
  - [ ] No new failed tests, build errors, or warnings

---
